programs.title: Modern Family
programs.desc: The Dunphys want a new car and Phil makes a spontaneous purchase without Claire. Jay is determined to sort his high school reunion with Gloria and Manny.

programs.title: Modern Family
programs.desc: Nothing is more quintessential to good old family fun than a trip to Disneyland - but not without a side of motion sickness, achy feet and a wayward toddler.

programs.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programs.desc: After eight weeks, it's all getting very real with the final Commitment Ceremony, as the couples face the experts for one last time before Final Vows.

programs.title: First Dates
programs.desc: Barrister Sarah meets Dan, an ex-military man guilty of too many dad jokes. And besties Megan and Ellena are out on a double date hoping to have their trust in men restored.

programs.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programs.desc: Gordon visits Arvada in Colorado, where out-of-control hoarder Randy and his wife Alexa have allowed their restaurant Old Neighborhood to fall into disrepair.

programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: Homer must transport a million-dollar bottle of wine to Mr Burns's mansion. And for once, it's not actually him who screws it up.
